# What changed?

Describe the changes made in this pull request.

Example:

- Added...
- Updated...
- Fixed...
- Refactored...

---

# Why?

Link the issue this PR resolves.

Example:

```
Closes #123
```

Briefly explain why these changes were necessary.

---

# Screenshots / Recordings

If your changes affect the UI or user experience, attach screenshots or recordings here.

> Remove this section if not applicable.

---

# Testing

Confirm the following before submitting:

- [ ] Feature works as expected
- [ ] Tested locally
- [ ] No console errors or warnings
- [ ] No TypeScript errors
- [ ] No linting errors
- [ ] Documentation updated (if required)
- [ ] Responsive across supported breakpoints (if UI changes)
- [ ] Existing functionality remains unaffected

### Additional Testing Notes

```text
Add any relevant testing notes here.
```
